title: My Skills
texts: Over the years I've had the chance to work across the full stack — from crafting pixel-perfect UIs in React to building backend services that handle real-world complexity. I started out in PHP and Laravel, then fell hard for the React / Node ecosystem, and lately I've been diving into AI orchestration and LLM integrations.

I like picking up new tools when they make sense, but I care more about writing things that actually work well than about chasing trends. The detailed list below is a pretty honest snapshot of what I've actually shipped with.
buttonText: Click here for a detailed list
